creator: johan@stromnet.se
text:
The port security/ossec-hids is on version 1.4. Current available version is 1.6.

Fix: 

The only change required is to change PORTVERSION, get new checksums and update th file-list (12 new files added as far as I can see). Patches apply and it builds and installs cleanly.

Builded with the above change and have been running for a week on 7.0
